headline: Jefferies Upgrades Arthur J. Gallagher to Buy, Raises Price Target to $265
summary: Jefferies  analyst Andrew Andersen   upgrades Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) from Hold to Buy and raises the price target from $235 to $265.
